Malaysian Men's Tennis Players

Player profiles compiled from public sources. See also women's profiles.

ML Mitsuki Leong ATP / ITF World Tennis Tour The highest-ranked Malaysian man in singles (June 2026). ATP singles No. 552 (June 2026) CD Christian Didier Chin ATP / ITF World Tennis Tour · Davis Cup Davis Cup regular and former top Malaysian junior. Not currently listed inside the main ATP rankings AM Adam Malik Former ATP Tour professional (retired) The first Malaysian to turn professional. Retired DS Darrshan Suresh ATP / ITF World Tennis Tour ITF Futures-circuit competitor. ATP singles around No. 1558 (June 2026)
Profiles draw on public data from the ATP, WTA, ITF, Tennis Explorer and Malaysian media. Where a detail is not publicly available it is marked rather than guessed. Corrections welcome via our Contact page.

Last updated: 19 June 2026

Tournaments, records and resources for Malaysian tennis — independent and editorial-first.

MalaysianOpenTennis.com is an independent tennis and sports information website. We provide educational guides, tournament resources, and editorial content for Malaysian tennis fans and players.
